message.content:
Review the Check 1 verification task comparing rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram with card-place source.

Your specific focus areas:
1. Verify the usePoints hook at /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts correctly aggregates data from 3 stores
2. Verify the rescue service at /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/services/rescue.service.ts matches the logic in /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/redux/sagas/rescue/index.ts
3. Verify the products service at /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/services/products.service.ts matches /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/redux/sagas/points/products.ts

Critical checks:
- conversionFactor extraction logic
- participantId token extraction
- Response status validation
- Analytics events

Provide a detailed review report with APPROVED or REJECTED status.
